meta.feed_title: Latest World News on Fox News

items.title: Video shows gaping hole after small plane crashes into towering skyscraper
items.summary: A small aircraft crashed into Beijing's tallest skyscraper, the 108-story CITIC Tower, prompting an information blackout from Chinese authorities.

items.title: Rubio announces framework deal between Israel and Lebanon as experts warn Iran will fight to sabotage it
items.summary: Secretary of State Rubio and PM Netanyahu welcome U.S.-brokered framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon as a step toward lasting peace.

items.title: Woman stalked by charging bear on morning dog walk captures terrifying encounter on camera
items.summary: Tense video shows a woman stalked by a large bear while walking her dog in a wooded area in Canada, charging and circling her for nearly two minutes.

items.title: Cops drop murder probe after coroner rules man’s bloody stabbing death was freak accident
items.summary: British man Robert Brown, 57, was presumed to have been murdered after being found blood-soaked in England, but a coroner ruled he passed out drunk on a knife in his bag.

items.title: Ukraine launches what appears to be one of its largest drone attacks against Russia: report
items.summary: Ukraine launched a massive drone attack against Russia as the brutal, years-long war between the two European countries continues to drag on.

items.title: $600 million worth of heroin, meth and other seized drugs set on fire in Burma
items.summary: Burma destroyed over 50 tons of narcotics worth $600 million to mark the United Nations' International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking.

items.title: Iran nuclear deal hinges on IAEA access to long-blocked atomic weapon sites, experts say
items.summary: Iran's Foreign Ministry denies inviting IAEA inspectors while Trump claims Tehran agreed to highest level nuclear inspections, creating uncertainty.

items.title: Death toll from Venezuela earthquakes rises to at least 589, with thousands reported missing
items.summary: Venezuela earthquake death toll rises to 589 with over 2,980 injured as U.S. Marine Corps Maj. Gen. Jarrard arrives in Caracas to coordinate relief.

items.title: Israel slams UN report as 'political blood libel' for alleging deliberate targeting of Palestinian children
items.summary: Israel's U.N. ambassador and analysts slam a new report alleging the deliberate targeting of Palestinian children, calling it a biased political attack.

items.title: Trump says Venezuela earthquakes left 'devastating number of deaths' as US readies aid
items.summary: Trump says two massive earthquakes in Venezuela caused a devastating number of deaths and instructs U.S. agencies to prepare to assist quickly.

items.title: Shark attack survivor wakes from 10-day coma and shares first words with family at her hospital bedside
items.summary: Leah Stewart awoke from an induced coma after a shark attack at Coogee Beach in Sydney, sharing her first words 'I love you' with her family.

items.title: Colombia's 'El Tigre' secures presidency as leftist rival finally concedes defeat
items.summary: After initially challenging the results, Colombia's leftist candidate conceded a razor-thin loss to conservative outsider Abelardo de la Espriella.

items.title: Experts urge extreme caution on Iran's 'crown jewel' Hezbollah — terror group with US blood on its hands
items.summary: Experts warn the U.S. must remember Hezbollah has American blood on its hands as Iran nuclear talks include Lebanon ceasefire as a key condition.

items.title: Kim Jong Un calls for North Korea to build 2 large warships per year in major naval expansion push: report
items.summary: Kim Jong Un calls for building two large warships annually over five years, signaling a major expansion of North Korea's naval forces and capabilities.

items.title: Turkey detains over 200 suspects, including alleged ISIS militants, in sweeping raid ahead of NATO summit
items.summary: Turkey detained more than 200 suspects, including alleged ISIS militants, in a sweeping Ankara raid ahead of the July NATO summit Trump is expected to attend.

items.title: Trump gets major win against China in African rare earth minerals race
items.summary: Trump administration backs American mining company Virtus Minerals in the DRC to counter China's control of critical cobalt and copper supply chains.

items.title: Trump says Colombia's 'El Tigre' will be a 'great president' as socialist opponent launches legal challenge
items.summary: Trump congratulated de la Espriella on his apparent Colombia election win. With 99.9% counted, he leads 49.7% to 48.7%, but rival Cepeda has launched a challenge over voting irregularities.

items.title: Russia preparing hybrid attacks on NATO's eastern flank, intelligence warns
items.summary: Latvian intelligence warns Russia is preparing military provocations against Baltic states or Poland, including drones and missiles, to pressure NATO.

items.title: Suspect 'neutralized' after Montreal shooting leaves at least 2 dead including officer
items.summary: Authorities in Montreal neutralized a suspected gunman after a fatal shooting Monday in the Côte-des-Neiges neighborhood left two people dead.

items.title: Keith Kellogg tells Iranian dissidents the 'window is open' to force regime change in Tehran
items.summary: Lt. Gen. Keith Kellogg urged Iranian dissidents at a Paris NCRI gathering to seize a historic opening, saying the Tehran regime is weaker than ever.

items.title: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister after devastating Labour revolt and local election losses
items.summary: British PM Keir Starmer announced his resignation after Labour's devastating local election losses and a mounting revolt from within his own party ranks.

items.title: US military conducts strike on another vessel carrying alleged narco-traffickers, killing 2
items.summary: The U.S. military announced a lethal strike on a vessel in the Caribbean allegedly carrying narco-traffickers, killing two people and leaving six survivors.

items.title: Major dispute to threaten Trump's Iran deal over billions in frozen Tehran funds: expert
items.summary: U.S.-Iran talks in Switzerland face their first major test over who controls billions in potentially unfrozen Iranian assets, an analyst warned.

items.title: Meloni's spat with Trump is calculated strategy to boost her approval ratings: expert
items.summary: Analyst says Meloni's public feud with President Trump is a calculated strategy to boost her declining approval ratings ahead of Italy's 2027 general election.

items.title: Albanian protesters flood streets demanding prime minister's resignation amid corruption accusations
items.summary: Albania protests target Socialist PM Edi Rama over corruption allegations, not Kushner investments, former ambassador tells Fox News Digital.
